papers.name: Paper 1 Document Question
papers.coverage_notes: AS Level component. One document question.

papers.name: Paper 2 Outlines
papers.coverage_notes: AS + A Level outlines (choose 2 from list).

papers.name: Paper 3 Interpretations
papers.coverage_notes: A Level component. Interpretations question + essay.

papers.name: Paper 4 Depth Study
papers.coverage_notes: A Level component. Depth study essay.

assessment_objectives.name: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of historical events, individuals, periods and changes.
classification_hints: Dates, names, places, terminology, recall of events.

assessment_objectives.name: Explain, analyse and evaluate
assessment_objectives.description: Explain, analyse and evaluate historical events, periods and historians' work.
classification_hints: Explanation, analysis of causes/consequences, evaluation of sources or arguments.

assessment_objectives.name: Use historical sources
assessment_objectives.description: Use historical sources to construct arguments and reach judgements.
classification_hints: Source analysis, corroboration, judgement about usefulness/reliability.

difficulty_ladder.description: Recall of facts, definitions or single-step application.

lesson_use.notes: Set supported=true only when a teacher/student/parent mode is declared and validated.

marking_guidance.command_words_ref: CAIE A-Level History command words defined in Section 4 of the syllabus.
marking_guidance.notes: AS Level (P1+P2) + A Level (P3+P4). Levels A*-E.
